issues.message: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.

actual.error: intent lost or altered explicit millimeter values from the user request: [85.0]; intent moved or altered source measurements bound to route_rise: [85.0]; outward_escape direct required-anchor realization predicts a minimum curvature radius of 2.72665 mm but at least 18 mm is required after deterministic handle optimization (factors [0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 0.25, 0.55]). Redistribute or add well-separated relative anchors so each direction change is spread over more distance
